channel.title: LACP on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in LACP on simeononsecurity

item.title: Cisco CCNA (200-301): Network Access
item.category: "Cisco CCNA Course" , "Networking" , "Switching" , "VLANs" , "Spanning Tree" , "Wireless" , "Cisco Certification" , "Network Access" , "EtherChannel" , "IT Networking"
item.description: Master network access for the Cisco CCNA 200-301 exam. Learn VLANs, trunking, EtherChannel, Rapid PVST+ spanning tree, discovery protocols, and Cisco wireless architectures.

item.title: Network Plus Course: Bandwidth Management and QoS
item.category: "Technology" , "Networking" , "IT Certifications" , "Network Management" , "Bandwidth Management" , "QoS" , "Traffic Shaping" , "Ethernet Switching" , "Network Performance" , "Network Optimization"
item.description: Learn about bandwidth management, quality of service (QoS), and techniques for prioritizing network traffic in this comprehensive guide for CompTIA's Network+ Certification Exam.
